title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MagicBricks South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MagicBricks South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at MagicBricks South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About MagicBricks South Asia Partners:
MagicBricks South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks South Asia Partners!
